requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Sierra Leone Local Fire Authority and Donor-Referenced IEC 62933-5-2 Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——塞拉利昂当地消防主管机关及捐助方引用的IEC 62933-5-2要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——獅子山當地消防主管機關及捐助方引用的IEC 62933-5-2要求

summary.en: Sierra Leone does not have a confirmed standalone national fire safety installation code for stationary battery energy storage systems equivalent to NFPA 855 or BS EN 62485-3. Fire safety for BESS installations in Sierra Leone falls under the jurisdiction of the Sierra Leone Fire Force (SLFF), established under the Sierra Leone Fire Force Act. Building permits and fire safety inspections for commercial and industrial facilities are administered at the local council level and through the SLFF. As of the dataset date, a publicly confirmed, BESS-specific fire safety installation standard or technical guideline issued by SLFF or a central Sierra Leone building authority has not been identified. In practice, donor-financed BESS projects in Sierra Leone — such as solar mini-grid programmes backed by UNOPS, FCDO, or the World Bank — specify fire safety requirements through their own project-level specifications, which typically reference IEC 62933-5-1:2024 (Safety Considerations — Hazard Identification, Risk Assessment and Risk Mitigation) and IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for Electrochemical-Based Systems). BESS project teams should engage the SLFF and relevant local council authority at the earliest project stage to determine applicable fire safety permitting requirements. High coastal humidity (Freetown is on the Atlantic coast), equatorial temperatures, and Harmattan dust conditions are relevant environmental factors for enclosure design, thermal management, and fire risk assessment.
summary.zh: 塞拉利昂目前没有经确认的专门针对固定式储能电池系统的国家消防安全安装规范，与NFPA 855或BS EN 62485-3相当。塞拉利昂的BESS装置消防安全由依据《塞拉利昂消防部队法》设立的塞拉利昂消防部队（SLFF）管辖。商业及工业设施的建筑许可和消防安全检查由地方议会层面和SLFF共同管理。截至本数据集日期，未发现SLFF或塞拉利昂中央建筑主管机关已公开确认发布专门针对BESS的消防安全安装标准或技术指南。实际上，塞拉利昂捐助方资助的BESS项目——如UNOPS、FCDO或世界银行支持的太阳能微电网项目——通过项目级规格规定消防安全要求，通常引用IEC 62933-5-1:2024（安全考量——危险识别、风险评估和风险缓解）和IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）。BESS项目团队应在项目最早阶段与SLFF及相关地方议会主管机关接触，确定适用的消防安全许可要求。高沿海湿度（弗里敦位于大西洋沿岸）、赤道温度及哈马丹沙尘条件是外壳设计、热管理及火灾风险评估的相关环境因素。
summary.zht: 獅子山目前沒有經確認的專門針對固定式儲能電池系統的國家消防安全安裝規範，與NFPA 855或BS EN 62485-3相當。獅子山的BESS裝置消防安全由依據《獅子山消防部隊法》設立的獅子山消防部隊（SLFF）管轄。商業及工業設施的建築許可和消防安全檢查由地方議會層面和SLFF共同管理。截至本數據集日期，未發現SLFF或獅子山中央建築主管機關已公開確認發布專門針對BESS的消防安全安裝標準或技術指南。實際上，獅子山捐助方資助的BESS項目——如UNOPS、FCDO或世界銀行支持的太陽能微電網項目——通過項目級規格規定消防安全要求，通常引用IEC 62933-5-1:2024（安全考量——危險識別、風險評估和風險緩解）和IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）。BESS項目團隊應在項目最早階段與SLFF及相關地方議會主管機關接觸，確定適用的消防安全許可要求。高沿海濕度（弗里敦位於大西洋沿岸）、赤道溫度及哈馬丹沙塵條件是外殼設計、熱管理及火災風險評估的相關環境因素。

standards_or_laws: Sierra Leone Fire Force Act (Cap. 189, Laws of Sierra Leone) — establishes the Sierra Leone Fire Force (SLFF) as the fire safety authority
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Considerations — Hazard Identification, Risk Assessment and Risk Mitigation (expected in donor-financed project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected in donor-financed project specifications for lithium BESS)
Local council building permit and fire inspection requirements (Freetown City Council or relevant district council) — verify directly before installation

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety through a combination of mandatory national standards and project-level fire authority review. GB 44240-2024 (effective August 1, 2025) includes mandatory fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is conducted through local fire authority (消防) approval procedures under the Fire Protection Law. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not referenced by the SLFF or Sierra Leone building authorities and are not recognised as equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 or donor-specified fire safety requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC 62933-5-2-aligned design documentation and SLFF / local council fire safety approval for Sierra Leone projects.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性国家标准与项目级消防主管机关审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月1日起生效）包含BESS电芯和模组的强制消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023涵盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查依据《消防法》通过地方消防主管机关（消防）审批程序进行。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序未被SLFF或塞拉利昂建筑主管机关参照，不被视为等同于IEC 62933-5-2或捐助方规定的消防安全要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须为塞拉利昂项目补充符合IEC 62933-5-2的设计文件以及SLFF/地方议会消防安全批准。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性國家標準與項目級消防主管機關審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月1日起生效）包含BESS電芯和模組的強制消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023涵蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查依據《消防法》通過地方消防主管機關（消防）審批程序進行。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序未被SLFF或獅子山建築主管機關參照，不被視為等同於IEC 62933-5-2或捐助方規定的消防安全要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須為獅子山項目補充符合IEC 62933-5-2的設計文件以及SLFF/地方議會消防安全批准。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage)

gap.en: Gap: No confirmed national BESS-specific fire safety installation code exists in Sierra Leone as of the dataset date. SLFF and local council fire safety approval are the operative requirements, but the specific technical standard they apply to BESS has not been confirmed from official sources. Chinese GB fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Sierra Leone project or authority requirements. Project teams should: (a) engage the Sierra Leone Fire Force (SLFF) and the relevant local council (Freetown City Council for Freetown-based installations) before finalising system layout to determine applicable fire permitting requirements; (b) prepare IEC 62933-5-2-aligned fire safety design documentation — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, ventilation and gas detection, emergency shutdown, and separation distances — for donor project and SLFF review; (c) account for Sierra Leone's tropical environment in the fire risk assessment: high ambient humidity (coastal, >80% RH common in rainy season), peak ambient temperatures above 35 °C, and Harmattan dry season dust ingress — all affect thermal runaway risk, enclosure IP rating, and BMS operating parameters; (d) for donor-financed projects (World Bank, AfDB, UNOPS, FCDO), confirm the lender's Environmental and Social Standards (ESS) and fire safety evidence requirements in the procurement specification before selecting BESS equipment.
gap.zh: 差距：截至本数据集日期，塞拉利昂尚无经确认的专门针对BESS的国家消防安全安装规范。SLFF和地方议会消防安全审批是实际要求，但其适用于BESS的具体技术标准尚未从官方来源得到确认。中国GB消防安全文件不满足塞拉利昂项目或主管机关要求。项目团队应：（a）在确定系统布局前与塞拉利昂消防部队（SLFF）及相关地方议会（弗里敦装置对应弗里敦市议会）接触，确定适用的消防许可要求；（b）准备符合IEC 62933-5-2的消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、通风和气体探测、紧急停机及隔离距离——供捐助方项目和SLFF审查；（c）在火灾风险评估中考虑塞拉利昂的热带环境：高环境湿度（沿海地区，雨季相对湿度通常>80%）、峰值环境温度超过35°C及哈马丹旱季粉尘进入——均影响热失控风险、外壳IP等级及电池管理系统（BMS）运行参数；（d）对于捐助方资助项目（世界银行、非洲开发银行、UNOPS、FCDO），在选择BESS设备前确认贷款方采购规格中的环境和社会标准（ESS）及消防安全证据要求。
gap.zht: 差距：截至本數據集日期，獅子山尚無經確認的專門針對BESS的國家消防安全安裝規範。SLFF和地方議會消防安全審批是實際要求，但其適用於BESS的具體技術標準尚未從官方來源得到確認。中國GB消防安全文件不滿足獅子山項目或主管機關要求。項目團隊應：（a）在確定系統布局前與獅子山消防部隊（SLFF）及相關地方議會（弗里敦裝置對應弗里敦市議會）接觸，確定適用的消防許可要求；（b）準備符合IEC 62933-5-2的消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、通風和氣體探測、緊急停機及隔離距離——供捐助方項目和SLFF審查；（c）在火災風險評估中考慮獅子山的熱帶環境：高環境濕度（沿海地區，雨季相對濕度通常>80%）、峰值環境溫度超過35°C及哈馬丹旱季粉塵進入——均影響熱失控風險、外殼IP等級及電池管理系統（BMS）運行參數；（d）對於捐助方資助項目（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、UNOPS、FCDO），在選擇BESS設備前確認貸款方採購規格中的環境和社會標準（ESS）及消防安全證據要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SLFF fire safety approval and local council building permit required for commercial and industrial BESS installations in Sierra Leone; no confirmed BESS-specific national fire code adopted as of dataset date — verify directly with SLFF and the relevant local council
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements under the Fire Protection Law

source.publisher: Parliament of Sierra Leone — Sierra Leone Fire Force Act (Cap. 189, Laws of Sierra Leone)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed BESS-specific national fire safety installation code has been identified for Sierra Leone as of the dataset date. SLFF and local council fire safety approvals are the operative gates. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Sierra Leone project or authority requirements. Engage the SLFF and Freetown City Council (or relevant district council) at the earliest project stage. Prepare IEC 62933-5-2-aligned fire safety design documentation for donor project review. Account explicitly for Sierra Leone's tropical coastal environment — high humidity, dust ingress, and peak temperatures — in enclosure design, thermal management specifications, and fire risk assessment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，塞拉利昂尚无经确认的BESS专项国家消防安全安装规范。SLFF和地方议会消防安全审批是实际门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足塞拉利昂项目或主管机关要求。在项目最早阶段与SLFF及弗里敦市议会（或相关地区议会）接触。为捐助方项目审查准备符合IEC 62933-5-2的消防安全设计文件。在外壳设计、热管理规格及火灾风险评估中明确考虑塞拉利昂热带沿海环境——高湿度、粉尘进入及峰值温度。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，獅子山尚無經確認的BESS專項國家消防安全安裝規範。SLFF和地方議會消防安全審批是實際門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足獅子山項目或主管機關要求。在項目最早階段與SLFF及弗里敦市議會（或相關地區議會）接觸。為捐助方項目審查準備符合IEC 62933-5-2的消防安全設計文件。在外殼設計、熱管理規格及火災風險評估中明確考慮獅子山熱帶沿海環境——高濕度、粉塵進入及峰值溫度。
